description: Angular component for editing product details, including form handling, routing, and service interactions.

classes.name: EditComponent
classes.description: Angular component class for editing products, managing form state, and handling user interactions.

methods.name: ngOnInit
methods.description: Initializes the form and sets up observables for product data based on route parameters.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits the form data to update the product via ProductService.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes the product using ProductService and navigates back to products list.

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Navigates back to the products list without saving changes.
